'''âm-l-f''' ('''malafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coagitate|coagitate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-l-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coagitate|coagitate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-l-f
|-
! Lemma
| malafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:malafithi|malafithi]] || [[word:malafiji|malafiji]] || [[word:malafishi|malafishi]] || [[word:malafi|malafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:malafuthuth|malafuthuth]] || [[word:malafujuj|malafujuj]] || [[word:malafushush|malafushush]] || [[word:malaf|malaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:malafuthu|malafuthu]] || [[word:malafuju|malafuju]] || [[word:malafushu|malafushu]] || [[word:malafu|malafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:malafufuth|malafufuth]] || [[word:malafufuj|malafufuj]] || [[word:malafufush|malafufush]] || [[word:malafuf|malafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:malafethe|malafethe]] || [[word:malafeje|malafeje]] || [[word:malafeshe|malafeshe]] || [[word:malafe|malafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:malafothoth|malafothoth]] || [[word:malafojoj|malafojoj]] || [[word:malafoshosh|malafoshosh]] || [[word:malaf|malaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:malafotho|malafotho]] || [[word:malafojo|malafojo]] || [[word:malafosho|malafosho]] || [[word:malafo|malafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:malafofoth|malafofoth]] || [[word:malafofoj|malafofoj]] || [[word:malafofosh|malafofosh]] || [[word:malafof|malafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:malafĂŠthĂŠ|malafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:malafĂŠjĂŠ|malafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:malafĂŠshĂŠ|malafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:malafĂŠ|malafĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:malafathath|malafathath]] || [[word:malafajaj|malafajaj]] || [[word:malafashash|malafashash]] || [[word:malaf|malaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:malafatha|malafatha]] || [[word:malafaja|malafaja]] || [[word:malafasha|malafasha]] || [[word:malafa|malafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:malafafath|malafafath]] || [[word:malafafaj|malafafaj]] || [[word:malafafash|malafafash]] || [[word:malafaf|malafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:malafasha|malafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomalafasha|gomalafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimalafasha|gokimalafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:malafnĂŒsha|malafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomalafnknĂŒsha|gomalafnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimalafnĂŒsha|gokimalafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:malafshĂ«sha|malafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomalafnkshĂ«sha|gomalafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimalafshĂ«sha|gokimalafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:malafrosha|malafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomalafnkrosha|gomalafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimalafrosha|gokimalafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:malafmusha|malafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomalafnkmusha|gomalafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimalafmusha|gokimalafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:malafsherasha|malafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomalafnksherasha|gomalafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimalafsherasha|gokimalafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:malafngasha|malafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomalafnkngasha|gomalafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimalafngasha|gokimalafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:malafyasha|malafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomalafnkyasha|gomalafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimalafyasha|gokimalafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:malafyamasha|malafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomalafnkyamasha|gomalafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimalafyamasha|gokimalafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:malafnĂŒshĂ«sha|malafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomalafnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gomalafnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimalafnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokimalafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:malafnĂŒrosha|malafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomalafnknĂŒrosha|gomalafnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimalafnĂŒrosha|gokimalafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:malafnĂŒmusha|malafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomalafnknĂŒmusha|gomalafnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimalafnĂŒmusha|gokimalafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:malafshĂ«nĂŒsha|malafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomalafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gomalafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimalafshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokimalafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:malafshĂ«rosha|malafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomalafnkshĂ«rosha|gomalafnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimalafshĂ«rosha|gokimalafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:malafshĂ«musha|malafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomalafnkshĂ«musha|gomalafnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimalafshĂ«musha|gokimalafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:malafronĂŒsha|malafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomalafnkronĂŒsha|gomalafnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimalafronĂŒsha|gokimalafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:malafroshĂ«sha|malafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomalafnkroshĂ«sha|gomalafnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimalafroshĂ«sha|gokimalafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:malafromusha|malafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomalafnkromusha|gomalafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimalafromusha|gokimalafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:malafmunĂŒsha|malafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomalafnkmunĂŒsha|gomalafnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimalafmunĂŒsha|gokimalafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:malafmushĂ«sha|malafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomalafnkmushĂ«sha|gomalafnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimalafmushĂ«sha|gokimalafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:malafmurosha|malafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomalafnkmurosha|gomalafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimalafmurosha|gokimalafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:malaf|malaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:mĂŠlĂŠf|mĂŠlĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homalaf|homalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:homĂŠlĂŠf|homĂŠlĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomalaf|hohomalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomĂŠlĂŠf|hohomĂŠlĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒmalaf|nĂŒmalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒmĂŠlĂŠf|nĂŒmĂŠlĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmalaf|nĂŒnĂŒmalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠlĂŠf|nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠlĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻmalaf|nĂŻmalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻmĂŠlĂŠf|nĂŻmĂŠlĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmalaf|nĂŻnĂŻmalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠlĂŠf|nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠlĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumalaf|lumalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lumĂŠlĂŠf|lumĂŠlĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumalaf|lulumalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumĂŠlĂŠf|lulumĂŠlĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limalaf|limalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:limĂŠlĂŠf|limĂŠlĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimalaf|lilimalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimĂŠlĂŠf|lilimĂŠlĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komalaf|komalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:komĂŠlĂŠf|komĂŠlĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomalaf|kokomalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomĂŠlĂŠf|kokomĂŠlĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemalaf|kemalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kemĂŠlĂŠf|kemĂŠlĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemalaf|kekemalaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemĂŠlĂŠf|kekemĂŠlĂŠf]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
